title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 319.111 - Closure of tanks, requirements — notice — department to establish
text:
319.111.  Closure of tanks, requirements — notice — department to establish. — The department shall establish requirements for the closure of tanks, including notice prior to closure, to prevent future releases of regulated substances to the environment.
(L. 1989 H.B. 77, et al. § 6)
